subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy letter dated 29 Safar 1338 was received, its contents replete with heartfelt sentiments [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه بتاریخ ۲۹ صفر ۱۳۳۸ وصول یافت مضمون مشحون بعواطف قلبیه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @spiritual transformation
